verdict.answer_first: B: sentence 1 gives the method plainly, "Heap snapshot diffing is the technique that actually finds it"; A also answers first with "fastest reliable path," but B is cleaner.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits harder to one path via "the technique" and a concrete "Quick start"; A is solid but branches into more alternatives earlier.
verdict.fabrication: none; neither invents the user's app details, though both make unsupported broad claims like A "almost always one of" and B "almost always pinpoints it."
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it gives a no-code command path: "--heapsnapshot-signal=SIGUSR2" plus "kill -USR2 <pid>" and a quick-start sequence.
